name: red-social-aprendizaje-colaborativo-inteligente
description: Plataforma donde los estudiantes co-crean conocimiento, la comunidad valida calidad, y un sistema inteligente organiza, recomienda y resume automáticamente

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:backend: cd backend/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../content-service && npm install && cd ../collaboration-service && npm install && cd ../reputation-service && npm install && cd ../recommendation-service && npm install && cd ../chatbot-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,user,content,collab,reputation,recommendation,chatbot,messaging,gateway,frontend -c green,yellow,magenta,blue,cyan,yellow,magenta,blue,cyan,red "npm run dev --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/content-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/collaboration-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/reputation-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/recommendation-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/chatbot-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/messaging-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"

author: Tu Nombre
